Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Your breathing is impaired, and your lips are pale.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Did you get enough sleep last night? And what do you usually have for lunch?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Ungh... Now that I think about it, I didn't eat breakfast today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Just as I thought—looks like anemia, probably from an unbalanced diet. It must be all the fast food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I recommend adding more shellfish to your diet, like oyster and abalone. They're packed with iron and easy to cook.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}This is just common sense. Being the son of a doctor doesn't have anything to do with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Well, this is just my amateur diagnosis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But you should still see a professional. I'm not a real doctor, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I'll take him to the nurse's office. You guys should head on home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Hiraga[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
